title: Slack notification referencing mirror column
excerpt: Would like to be able to reference the value in a linked column (not the created mirror columns which are reference-able) when sending notifications in Slack. Have tried a number of workarounds using formulas and monday …

posts.author: ecramer (eric)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like to be able to reference the value in a linked column (not the created mirror columns which are reference-able) when sending notifications in Slack. Have tried a number of workarounds using formulas and monday AI but none have been successful.
